bull_signals.text: Data center revenue grew 400% YoY, driven by Hopper architecture demand.
CEO mentioned Blackwell chip is in full production and sold out for next 12 months.

bear_signals.text: Gross margins dipped by 0.5% due to supply chain component costs.

risk_flags: Potential US export restrictions to China affecting 10% of revenue.

contradictions_resolved.claim_a: News article claimed Blackwell production delayed (Reuters).
contradictions_resolved.claim_b: CEO explicitly stated Blackwell is in full production (Earnings Call).
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Discarded news article claim; prioritized direct management quote from transcript.
